scripts.ces:evaluations:validate: node scripts/sync-ces-evaluations.mjs --dry-run --project demo-project --location us --app golf-store-customer-service --toolset golf-store-bigquery-mcp gecx/evaluations/Storefront_Irons_Experienced_Player/Storefront_Irons_Experienced_Player.json gecx/evaluations/Storefront_Irons_Yes_Retry/Storefront_Irons_Yes_Retry.json
scripts.site:prepare: npm run build --workspace packages/gecx-sdk && npm run build --workspace packages/gecx-components
scripts.site:dev: npm run site:prepare && npm run dev --workspace apps/static-site
scripts.site:build: npm run site:prepare && npm run build --workspace apps/static-site
